creator: garga@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 162764
haproxy.diff

- Enabled USE_CPU_AFFINITY to make cpu-map parameter work, I'll send a patch to upstream to add it by default on freebsd build profile
- Pet portlint fixing IGNORE messages and replacing spaces by tab
- Bump PORTREVISION
